subcodes.first_line: O unique and peerless one of that land! Thy letter dated the fifth of Rabi'u'l-Avval of this year hath arrived. From the severity of trials [3.5s]... ...For successive years, ‘Abdu’l-Baha traveled throughout the West, raising his voice in every assemblage and gathering to teach the Cause of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای وحید و فرید آندیار نامه پنجم ربیع الاول سنه حالیه رسید از شدت مشقات این
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment, @business; financial; property matters
